data.description:

  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from Intelligent Ultrasound Group Plc ( (GB:IUG) ).

The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. has disposed of its voting rights in Intelligent Ultrasound Group Plc, as indicated by the voting rights notification. This change in shareholder structure, with Goldman Sachs reducing its position to zero, may influence the company’s stock performance and investor confidence.

More about Intelligent Ultrasound Group Plc

Intelligent Ultrasound Group Plc operates within the medical technology industry, focusing on developing advanced ultrasound training and clinical ultrasound software. The company aims to transform the way ultrasound is delivered and improve the quality of medical care.

data.title: Crest Nicholson’s Voting Rights See Major Shift with Ameriprise Disposal
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Crest Nicholson Holdings ( (GB:CRST) ) has shared an announcement.

Crest Nicholson Holdings PLC has announced a change in the voting rights ownership, with Ameriprise Financial, Inc. reducing its stake from 9.929% to 4.925%. This shift indicates a significant disposal of voting rights, which could impact Crest Nicholson’s shareholder dynamics and influence corporate decisions. The update reflects a strategic move by Ameriprise Financial, which may have implications for the company’s governance and future decision-making processes.

More about Crest Nicholson Holdings

Crest Nicholson Holdings PLC is a UK-based company operating in the residential construction sector. The company specializes in building homes, focusing on creating sustainable and high-quality residential developments across the United Kingdom.

data.title: Golden Cariboo Resources Unveils 2025 Exploration Plans for Quesnelle Gold Quartz Mine
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Golden Cariboo Resources ( (TSE:GCC) ) has provided an announcement.

Golden Cariboo Resources Ltd. has announced its 2025 exploration program for the Quesnelle Gold Quartz Mine Property, aiming to build on the drilling successes of 2024. The company’s strategy involves further exploration of the Halo and North Hixon zones, with a focus on discovering high-grade gold domains and extending known gold systems. This initiative positions Golden Cariboo as a key player in the Cariboo Gold District, potentially enhancing its reputation and value within the mining sector.

More about Golden Cariboo Resources

Golden Cariboo Resources Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing primarily on gold exploration. The company is actively involved in the development of the Quesnelle Gold Quartz Mine Property and is dedicated to expanding its footprint in the Cariboo Gold District, a region known for its significant gold deposits.

XLMedia ( (GB:XLM) ) has shared an announcement.

XLMedia PLC has announced a change in its voting rights notification process, requiring holders to submit the TR-1 Form via the Electronic Submission System (ESS) for shares traded on UK regulated markets. data.title: DriveItAway Holdings Delays Quarterly Filing
data.description:
DriveItAway Holdings ( (DWAY) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

DriveItAway Holdings, Inc. has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the financial period ending December 31, 2024. The company cites the need for additional time to compile and review necessary information as the primary reason for the delay. DriveItAway Holdings expects to file the report within five calendar days following the prescribed due date, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements. Importantly, the company does not anticipate any significant changes in its financial results from the previous fiscal year. Moving forward, DriveItAway Holdings is committed to maintaining transparency and ensuring accurate financial disclosure, with this notification signed by CEO John Possumato.

More about DriveItAway Holdings

The latest announcement is out from Ion Beam Applications SA IBA ( (GB:0GZK) ).

IBA is organizing a Capital Markets Day on April 7, 2025, aimed at investors and analysts, which will feature presentations and discussions about the company’s strategic growth initiatives and performance drivers. This event is expected to provide deeper insights into IBA’s business lines and market positions, potentially influencing stakeholder perspectives and the company’s future market strategies.

More about Ion Beam Applications SA IBA

IBA (Ion Beam Applications S.A.) is a global leader in particle accelerator technology, providing equipment and services primarily in proton therapy, industrial sterilization, radiopharmaceuticals, and dosimetry. Headquartered in Louvain-la-Neuve, Belgium, the company employs around 2,000 people worldwide and is recognized as a certified B Corporation for its social and environmental performance.

Schroder UK Public Private Trust ( (GB:INOV) ) has provided an announcement.

Schroders Capital Global Innovation Trust plc, a company involved in managing investments, has announced the purchase and cancellation of 180,000 of its ordinary shares at a price of 9.76 pence per share. This transaction affects the company’s share capital, leaving the total number of voting rights at 810,052,025. Shareholders are advised to use this figure when calculating their interests in accordance with the Financial Conduct Authority’s rules.

data.title: Snow Lake Resources Expands Uranium Portfolio with Key U.S. Acquisition
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Snow Lake Resources ( (LITM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On February 18, 2025, Snow Lake Resources Ltd. announced its intent to acquire a 100% interest in the Buffalo Uranium Project located in Wyoming, which is a leading uranium jurisdiction in the United States. This strategic acquisition aligns with the company’s growth strategy and the U.S. energy policy emphasizing the expansion of nuclear energy. The project, centered on the historic Little Man Uranium Mine, has significant potential to add value to Snow Lake’s portfolio and support U.S. domestic uranium supply, benefiting from possible government funding and aligning with national energy goals.

More about Snow Lake Resources

Snow Lake Resources Ltd., operating as Snow Lake Energy, is a uranium exploration and development company with a focus on expanding its portfolio within the United States. The company is primarily involved in uranium projects and aims to capitalize on the growing demand for nuclear energy.
